The fact that there is no checking account due to the absence of a checking account, because the absence of a checking account, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that increases risk. [1]
The fact that the loan duration is longer due to extended repayment periods, because extended repayment periods, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that increases risk. [2]
The fact that there is a negative checking account balance due to a negative account balance, because a negative account balance, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [3]
Overall, this applicant is likely to have a low risk of default.

final_explanation_ko:
본 AI가 예측한 결과에 따르면,\n계좌 잔액 부족은 신용 위험이 증가할 수 있는 요인으로 판단됩니다 [1].
대출 기간이 길어짐에 따라 상환 부담이 커져 신용 위험이 상승하는 요인으로 분석됩니다 [2].
계좌 잔액이 마이너스인 경우 일반적으로 신용 위험을 증가시키는 신호로 여겨지지만, 본 모델은 이를 신용 위험 감소 요인으로 해석합니다 [3].
전반적으로 신용 위험이 낮은 수준으로 평가되어 대출 승인 가능성이 높습니다.
